title: Median of Two Sorted Arrays
description:
Given two sorted arrays `nums1` and `nums2`, return the median of the combined
sorted array in O(log(m+n)) time.

solutions.summary: Binary-search a split of the smaller array so left halves hold exactly half the elements.

steps.title: Search the partition of the smaller array
steps.explanation: Pick a cut in the smaller array; the cut in the other is forced. Adjust until the left maxes do not exceed the right mins, then read the median off the boundary.
